summary: A fourslash test failed due to an assertion mismatch: the actual code-fix message was 'Add return type 'Foo<string>'' but the test expected a longer message including additional generic parameters.
root_cause: A fourslash test assertion failed: expected code-fix text did not match actual code-fix text for tests/cases/fourslash/codeFixMissingTypeAnnotationOnExports52-generics-oversimplification.ts.

suggested_fix: Either update the expected code-fix message in tests/cases/fourslash/codeFixMissingTypeAnnotationOnExports52-generics-oversimplification.ts to match the current code-fix output, or fix the code-fix generation logic so the produced message includes the expected generic parameters. Re-run the single fourslash test locally (or via the test runner) to confirm the change.
